sections.paragraph:
f. (from the root סָכַךְ), a covering, Eze 28:13.

I. מַסֵּכָה f. (from the root נָסַךְ No. I).-

(1) the casting of metal. עֵגֶל מַסֵּכָה a calf cast (of metal), Exo 32:4, Exo 32:8. אֱלֹהֵי מַסֵּכָה the cast images of gods, Exo 34:17. Specially a molten image, Deu 9:12 Jud. 17:3 , Jdg 17:4.

(2) σπονδή, a league, Isa 30:1.

II. מַסֵּכָה f. (from the root נָסַךְ No. II), a covering, Isa 25:7.
